compiled_state.title: debug-everything orchestrator adds new features without escalating to user for confirmation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: The debug-everything orchestrator implemented TEST_FILTER support (a new feature) while processing bug tickets, without recognizing it as a feature request or asking the user for confirmation. The orchestrator should detect when a proposed fix introduces new functionality beyond the bug's scope and escalate to the user instead of implementing autonomously. This is a variant of scope creep — the fix-bug pipeline's Gate 1b (feature request check) should catch this, but the orchestrator bypassed it by treating the feature as a natural extension of the bug fix.
